name: Pineapple with Shrimp and Dill
recipeIngredient: 2 whole eggs, hard cooked and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and slice the pineapple into bite-size triangles. Cover and refrigerate.
2. Cook the shrimp in boiling salted water, then drain and rinse with cold water. Peel and devein the shrimp, and refrigerate.
3. In a large bowl, prepare homemade mayonnaise and combine it with the remaining remoulade ingredients: yogurt, garlic, parsley, capers, lemon juice, eggs, dry mustard, chives, anchovy paste, dill, and tarragon. Whisk until well combined.
4. Rinse lettuce leaves and drain them. Tear the lettuce into pieces large enough to hold one pineapple slice.
5. Arrange the lettuce on a serving platter. Place a pineapple slice on each leaf, top with one shrimp, and garnish with a dill sprig.
